WhatsApp Business API Conversational Cost Pricing

WhatsApp charges additional charges per conversation

User initiated conversation

Whenever a business replies to a user within the 24 hour customer service window, that message initiates a user-initiated conversation

Business initiated conversation

A conversation that initiates from a business sending a user a message outside the 24-hour customer service window.

Frequently asked questions

Will you help us with green tick verification?

Yes, we assist you with the green tick verification process on WhatsApp Business API.

Can I access WhatHub on my computer?

Yes, WhatHub is accessible on your computer via any modern web browser.

What are the conversation charges?

Conversation charges depend on Meta's WhatsApp Business API pricing. Please check the Pricing page for details.

Can you consult us for a WhatsApp strategy?

Absolutely! Our team can help you design an effective WhatsApp communication strategy for your business.

How many people can I send a broadcast to at once?

You can send broadcasts to unlimited contacts at once using WhatHub's campaign feature.

How can I avoid the suspension of the WhatsApp number?

Follow Meta's messaging guidelines, avoid spammy content, and maintain a good quality rating to prevent suspension.

Is 3rd-party integration available on WhatHub?

Yes, WhatHub supports integrations with CRMs, e-commerce platforms, and other third-party tools via API and webhooks.
